## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is it needed?

## Motivation

- Link issues, standards, incidents, or design references.

## Implementation Details

- Core design choices
- Data or schema impact
- Security or trust impact

## Standards Check

- [ ] AI risk and misuse implications reviewed
- [ ] Data provenance and handling implications reviewed
- [ ] Citizen science / public contribution implications reviewed if applicable
- [ ] Prime-safe visibility boundary preserved or explicitly justified
- [ ] Commit sign-offs added or exception explained
- [ ] Licensing and third-party material reviewed
- [ ] Data classification reviewed

## AI Usage Disclosure

- AI used in this change: yes / no
- If yes, describe the tool, the affected files or tasks, and the human verification performed.

## Data Classification

- Highest classification touched by this change: Public / Internal / Restricted / Cryptic
- If anything above Public was involved, explain how it was excluded from the committed content.

## Testing

- [ ] `dotnet build .\HolographicDataTool.sln`
- [ ] `dotnet test .\Hdt.Tests\Hdt.Tests.csproj`
- [ ] Artifact validation performed when applicable

## Deployment Notes

- Runtime, config, or migration effects

## Follow-up Work

- Remaining tasks or deferred risks
